title: HYG Cobblemon
description: A Cobblemon 1.7 pack centered around having a comfortable and cozy experience alongside Create- Originally developed for the HYG private server.
body:
This is a sizable pack designed with a heavy focus on Cobblemon and Create while making a cozy environment. Best experienced with a group friends.

It's also designed to be a much more up-to-date pack centered directly around Cobblemon 1.7, and will recieve occasional updates when respective mods patch.

### Featured
- Cobblemon 1.7- Catch them all and battle your friends! (Of course)
- Mega Showdown- Dive deeper into the world of Cobblemon, and gather Legendaries!
- Radical Trainers- Challenge the world and become the best!
- Create 6.0- Make an infrastructure or create advanced factories and farms!
- Let's Do- Have a comfy farm, enjoy the environment and treat your friends.
- Biomes O' Plenty, Oh the Biomes We've Gone, and Regions Unexplored- the world is larger, enjoy the sights and explore the world.
- Much more! There's a lot of decorative blocks, visual mods, and some more world gen to help make the world feel much more lively.

### Miscellaneous Information
The natural spawning of Hostile mobs have been disabled- but not completely gone, spawners and other abnormal methods still bring them in to allow mob farms and access to unique items.

Additionally, it has two custom items that- while they don't have any official uses, allow for players to set up an economy however they wish.

Lastly, there's a variety of visual settings that can be tuned to provide a better experience.

It is recommended to play with 6-8gb.
